query:
SELECT 
  c.code,
  c.title,
  COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) as lesson_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) as quiz_count,
  ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) / COUNT(DISTINCT l.id), 0) as avg_questions_per_lesson
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions q ON l.id = q.lessonId
WHERE c.code LIKE 'GED%'
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.title
ORDER BY c.code;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT 
  c.code,
  c.title,
  COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) as lesson_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) as quiz_count,
  ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) / COUNT(DISTINCT l.id), 0) as avg_questions_per_lesson
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions q ON l.id = q.lessonId
WHERE c.code LIKE 'GED%'
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.title
ORDER BY c.code;
